summary: All four requirements are substantially implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is covered by backend/main.mo (new Journey type with id, customTitle, journeysV2 map keyed by Nat removing city uniqueness) and backend/migration.mo. REQ-2 is covered by useQueries.ts (customTitle forwarded in add/edit mutations). REQ-3 is covered by TraveloguePanel.tsx and AdminPanel.tsx (Journey Title input in add/edit forms). REQ-4 is covered by TraveloguePanel.tsx (groupJourneysByCity, collapsible city groups, getJourneyLabel fallback to date). No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features are detected.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added to handle migration from the old city-keyed journey map to the new Nat-keyed journeysV2 map.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any migration module or migration logic; it only asked to update the Journey type and storage. While the migration may be necessary for production correctness, it was not specified in the requirements.
